decontamination_notes: Original scenario authored for VulcanBench on 2026-06-01; not derived from any public repository, issue, or dataset, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: once_fires_once
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^once fires its listener only on the first emit$' tests/emitter.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: off_targeted_only
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^off only removes the targeted listener$' tests/emitter.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: once_unsubscribed_after
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^once is unsubscribed after it fires$' tests/emitter.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: on_emit_args
pass_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^on \+ emit invokes the listener with args$' tests/emitter.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: emit_order
pass_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^emit calls listeners in subscription order$' tests/emitter.test.ts
